programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Bow-M0'. Dre calls into a radio show and gets humiliated in front of Diane and tries to redeem himself. Bow tries to bond with a group of young female doctors and learns the hard truth.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House Of Payne
programme.desc: 'S9/E15 - The Paranoid And The Private'. Curtis' food truck is broken into and a much-loved family heirloom is stolen.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's House Of Payne
programme.desc: 'S9/E16 - Of Mice And Men'. Everyone is excited for Malik when he finally gets a good paying job. But that enthusiasm turns to a disappointment when they find out that it's for a weed dispensary.

programme.title: The Impact Atlanta
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Time to Face the Music'. Jayda gets some concerning news about her sister, Jazz. Tae's family helps him realise that he might not be ready for a salon

programme.title: Black Ink Crew: Chicago
programme.desc: 'S7/E1 - Ready To Reclaim Our Time'. Ryan's personal life is in disarray. Charmaine has a new baby and new job, and Phor made a love connection that has become a pregnancy.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew: Chicago
programme.desc: 'S7/E2 - Second Episode, Second City'. Ryan faces off with a one-time close friend who feels he committed the ultimate betrayal. Kitty begins her tenure at 2nd City Ink by finding out how far she can't go.

programme.title: Black Girl Erupted
programme.desc: Reina pays her dues at a law firm while facing micro-aggressions from co-workers and her boss, Mr. Horowitz.

programme.title: Beatz & Rhymes
programme.desc: 'S2/E2'. A daily music show hosted by Ayanda MVP that celebrates black excellence while profiling various personalities from all walks of life.

programme.title: Her Majesty: Busiswa
programme.desc: 'S1/E108'. A reality show that serves as a visual companion to Busiswa's music journey.

programme.title: My Wife And Kids
programme.desc: 'S3/E17 - Jr's Risky Business Part 1'. Michael Kyle is a modern-day patriarch who rules his household with a unique parenting style. As he teaches his children life lessons, he does so with his own brand of humorous wisdom.

programme.title: My Wife And Kids
programme.desc: 'S3/E18 - Jr's Risky Business Part 2'. Michael Kyle is a modern-day patriarch who rules his household with a unique parenting style. As he teaches his children life lessons, he does so with his own brand of humorous wisdom.

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Bow-M0'. Dre calls into a radio show and gets humiliated in front of Diane and tries to redeem himself. Bow tries to bond with a group of young female doctors and learns the hard truth.

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: 'S8/E4 - Hoop Dreams'. Jack gets a job as the locker room attendant for the Los Angeles Lakers. Dre and Bow feel like they need to step in before his job goes to his head.

programme.title: College Hill: Celebrity Drop Outs
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Y'all... We Need to Talk About Ray!'. It's the middle of their second week at TSU and the housemates are getting their grades for their Biology final and African American Studies.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - All Will Bee Revealed'. As the day of reckoning dawns, KP, Tim, Star and Cory are surprised by who shows up at the IAM shop willing to work. Vudu meets with her biological father for the first time since childhood.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York
programme.desc: 'S10/E10 - What Happens Now?'. While Ted and Puma address the fallout from Orlando, Tatti starts her new life post Black Ink. Bae attempts to make amends with Krystal as Rok decides whether he's more loyal to Krystal or Black Ink.

programme.title: Dance For Me
programme.desc: When exotic dancer, Isis Shaw, falls for a handsome politician, the two are quickly swept up in a whirlwind romance. But their love is put to the test when a hard-edged con artist from Isis' past decides to target her new love.

programme.desc: 'S1/E13'. The animated adventures of friends who bring colour to the world. Colours learn about themselves through adventure and play with the Colourblocks.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: 'S4/E18 - The Eating Badge'. The Squirrels are having a picnic and notice that the chickens eat differently than they do. Duggee has his eating badge and can explain all the different ways animals eat.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: 'S4/E36 - The Exercise Badge'. Duggee and the Squirrels set off on a warm-up run together. The Squirrels are feeling sleepy, but they are told that a bit of exercise will wake them up!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: 'S4/E26 - The Commuting Badge'. Norrie is running late to Squirrel Club, so Duggee teaches the squirrels what a commute is - a journey that can take you from home to learn, work or play.

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: 'S1/E58 - More About Coming and Going'. The Twirlywoos watch a man flying a model plane. Toodloo jumps into the plane and Great BigHoo grabs the controls! The Marching Band visit - but are they coming or going?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E80 - Fast Slow, Fast Slow'. The Teletubbies take it in turns to go up and down on the Dup Dup. Sometimes they go fast and sometimes they go slow - even The Noo-­-noo has a turn!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E85 - I Spy'. The voice trumpet leads a game of 'I Spy' where the Teletubbies have to spot different colours - purple, green, yellow and red. What or who can they spot with those colours?

programme.title: In The Night Garden ZinkyZonk Specials
programme.desc: When the toys of the Night Garden cant sleep, the Zonk leads them to the ZonkyZoney, an enchanted grove where they can zinkyzzzonk in peace.

programme.title: Justin's House
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Auntie Justina Visits'. Auntie Justina is paying a visit, and everything needs to be spick and span with Little Monster well and truly out of the way.

programme.title: Justin's House
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Housewarming'. Justin decides to throw a housewarming party, but Robert the Robot turns the heating up too high and Justin forgets to invite the guests!

programme.title: Mister Maker Comes To Town
programme.desc: 'S2/E25 - Old Shoelace Picture'. Mister Maker visits a Mini Maker and reveals how to make a picture out of old shoelaces. Also, some lucky children take a trip to ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Mister Maker Around the World
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. The globetrotter creates something prehistoric in South America.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E45 - Special Cake'. Topsy and Tim receive help from their babysitter Danielle when they decide to make a special cake.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim

programme.desc: 'S1/E58 - More About Coming and Going'. The Twirlywoos watch a man flying a model plane. Toodloo jumps into the plane and Great BigHoo grabs the controls! The Marching Band visit - but are they coming or going?

programme.desc: 'S8/E11 - Never Eat Soggy Waffles'. Captain Captain fancies some waffles for her tea and sends the pirates to fetch some for her from her secret stockpile, and hands over a map and compass to Sandy and Seaweed.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E22 - Postman Pat and the Greendale Ukulele Big Band'. Pat is delivering a big box of lovely Ukeleles for Reverend Timms 'Ukelele Big Band'.

programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Farming Machines'. Grace looks at three amazing farming machines: a skid steer, a tracked tractor and a tomato harvester.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Episode 8'. Andy, Jen and Scout head to Cape town, off the coast of South Africa, on a global adventure to find out why African penguins are living in the city.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: 'S22/E8'. Samson is terrified of fireworks, and when he mistakes the sound of a warning detonator for fireworks, he is so frightened that he races off into the fog and gets lost.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Noddy and the Case of Jumpy Revs'. The pirates are on a treasure hunt and there's chaos in Toyland! Revs, Noddy's bell, and Big Ears' spoons keep jumping in one direction for no obvious reason.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Postman Pat and the Super Skateboard Sizzle'. Ajay's organised a big 'Skateboard Sizzle' competition for everyone, now he must wait for Pat to deliver his new skateboard and safety gear.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Yoga Ball'. Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Calypso'. At school, Bluey and her friends enjoy various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song... all except the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - The Doctor'. Honey is stuck waiting for Dr Bingo's as the other injuries get seen before her. Receptionist Bluey tells her to be patient, some of these cases are a real pickle!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E48 - Teasing'. Bluey, Bingo and Mum get into a debate with Dad about the definition of teasing. As they recall all the times where he's been a Big Teaser, Dad argues that he was only just playing.

programme.title: Supertato

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E127 - Ragdoll'. Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy ice cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E132 - Onesies'. When Mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E133 - Tradies'. Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering

programme.title: Engineering Reborn

programme.title: Engineering Reborn

programme.title: Winner Cake All
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - It's Game Day, Baby!'. Four of the best baking teams in America compete against each other in different creative cake challenges. The winning team leaves with $10,000 prize money.

programme.desc: 'S28/E15 - Sinful Sandwiches'. Guy Fieri challenges three food fanatics to prove that their sandwich skills. They start by making a Herculean hoagie with limited ingredients.

programme.title: Chopped Junior
programme.desc: 'S8/E1 - Basket Bon Voyage'. Four talented young chefs set out on a European-themed competition. Each round uses a country's traditional ingredients, including Italy, Germany and England.

programme.desc: 'S49/E7 - Cooked With Care!'. Four nurses who love to cook show off their culinary skills! In the appetiser round, the competitors are handed canned bacon, mahi mahi fillets and kohlrabi.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E35 - Raa Raa's Perfect Present'. Raa Raa is sure he has found the perfect present for each of his friends... but what happens if the packages get mixed up?

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E36 - Raa Raa The Copycat'. Raa Raa is playing a game - copying everyone in the jungle. He soon distracts his friends... but can he put the game to good use?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E33 - The Case Of The Disappearing Rainbow'. It's Fable Forest Rainbow Day when the big rainbow in Fable Forest sparkles and pops like a giant firework.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E34 - The Case Of The Flying Toy'. When Noddy sees Deltoid flying in the air he decides to investigate: how can they get Deltoid down?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E35 - The Case Of The Spooky Noise'. The Naughticorns have borrowed Noddy's music player to practise a special dance for Pat-Pat's Pumpkin Party.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Bravery'. Tired of the Mayor's needy cowardice, Puss tries to reassure him that he is a hero - but being 'brave' quickly goes to the Mayor's head.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Eep-Over/Thunkytown'. When Eep has the first-ever sleepover, scary noises and shadows send the girls screaming out of the cave, Thunk saves the day when Bear Owls invade.

programme.title: Dreamworks The Epic Tales of...
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Captain Underpants and the Costly Conundrum of the Calamitous Claylossus'. Rumors swirl around the shadowy Bo Hweemuth, a mysterious student with secret gifts who has the whole school living in fear.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Boss Babysitter'. Mom and Dad Templeton do the unthinkable: leave Boss Baby and Tim under the authority of a babysitter!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Big Trouble in Panda Village'. The kids must leave Po to escape into the forest and head back to Panda Village to prepare against Jindiao.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Lucky and the Cowboy Next Door'. Eager to follow in her mother's footsteps, Lucky gets lessons in trick riding from dashing young performer Javier.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - El Apasionado Negocio De La Ninera'. Frederic makes a play to take over the town's babysitters by instituting 'senior sitting'.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business

programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Dire Straits'. When a dragon that causes man-eating whirlpools threatens Berk's trade ships, the Dragon Riders must remove it without getting caught in its vortex.

programme.title: Dragons: Race To The Edge
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - The Longest Day'. With his teammates grounded due to lack of sleep from the midnight sun, Hiccup tries to help a hurt dragon alone, but suddenly gets in over his head.

programme.title: Dragons: Race To The Edge
programme.desc: 'S2/E21 - Gold Rush'. When Dagur appears at the Edge claiming to know where Viggo keeps his gold, the Dragon Riders fly off to find the stash and return Berk's stolen gold.

programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - The Battle(s) of Gongmen Bay'. Po and the Kids agree to escort a dirigible shipment of food, but Nu Hai discovers the dirigible is set to explode...with them on board!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Gongmen City Hustle'. Po and the Kids make it to Gongmen City in search of a contact. Meanwhile, Xiao takes off into the woods and meets a new friend.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Night of the White Bone Demon'. Po and the Kids make it to Volcano island and get some answers. Empress Xiao begins learning how to defend herself.

programme.title: Where's Wally?

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots

programme.desc: 'S1/E81'. Bhushan calls Sanjay and commands him to bring Pinky to his mansion. Geet and Malhar get suspicious after noticing Sanjay's behaviour.

programme.title: Vani Rani
programme.desc: 'S1/E43 - 1/43'. United by blood but separated by circumstances, twin sisters Vani and Rani, navigate a web of emotions, relationships, and challenges, each striving for individual identity and purpose.

programme.title: This Is Fate
programme.desc: 'S1/E75'. Kareen and Sherlyn conspire together and Sherlyn tries to humiliate Shristi, but Shristi turns the the tables on her by throwing paint on her and making her a laughing stock.

programme.title: Love Lies And Hybrids
programme.desc: An M-Net original film about infidelity. Jessica and her lover escape while her fiancé is away, but when he arrives to surprise her, he also finds himself in for a surprise.

programme.title: The Donor Party
programme.desc: A raunchy comedy about a divorced woman who yearns for a child. She takes drastic actions with the help of her friends to get pregnant.

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Love and self-discovery take centre stage in this romance. A reality TV star leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country. Will she stay or return to her old life?

programme.title: Under The Stars Of Paris
programme.desc: A homeless woman helps a migrant child separated from his mother in this touching story. She embarks on a journey to find the boy's mother.

programme.title: The Contrast
programme.desc: A lovely romantic comedy. A woman is about to marry when she meets a Colonel, and the two connect instantly, causing her to have doubts.

programme.title: Final Fantasy: The Spirits Within
programme.desc: A starry voice cast drives this thrilling sci-fi action adventure. With the help of a ragtag team of soldiers, a scientist defends Earth against an invasion of alien phantoms.

programme.title: Beyond Beyond
programme.desc: A great furry animation. While his father is away gathering provisions for their ship, young hare receives word about his long lost mother, so he embarks on an adventure.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go: Space Camp
programme.desc: A fun, exciting space animation. When his pet develops a strange allergic reaction, Jet and his friends use their space camp skills and go on a mission to find a cure.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes Of...
programme.desc: 'Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes Of Grindelwald'. Eddie Redmayne returns to JK Rowling's magical world. Newt, and the others, must try and stop Grindelwald after he escapes from prison.

programme.title: The Prince And Me
programme.desc: Julia Stiles drives this rom-com about class and love. A college girl falls for a young man who turns out to be a prince from Denmark.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Adam Sandler and Selena Gomez return for this monstrous sequel. When his daughter thinks of moving with her husband and son, Dracula tries every trick to keep his family together.

programme.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among...
programme.desc: 'Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves'. A funny adventure fantasy that brings the legendary roleplaying game to life. A thief and a group of adventurers seek a long-lost relic.

programme.title: Mr. Monk's Last Case: A Monk Movie
programme.desc: Tony Shalhoub returns as Adrian Monk in this enjoyable movie sequel to the beloved show. Monk steps out of retirement as his stepdaughter's wedding turns tragic.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence drives this heartfelt yet raunchy comedy. A woman, desperate for money, accepts a job to get a wealthy couple's introverted, awkward son out of his shell.

programme.title: Two Can Play That Game
programme.desc: Vivica A. Fox and Morris Chestnut star in this romantic comedy. A woman attempts to keep her man in check with a series of mind-games, but what happens when he starts playing too?

programme.title: The Black Phone
programme.desc: An unnerving horror starring Ethan Hawke. A young boy is abducted by a sadistic killer and kept in a basement, where he gets calls from the killer's past victims on a broken phone.

programme.title: The Tank
programme.desc: In this horror film, an ancient, long-dormant creature unearths the buried secrets of the new homeowners' ancestors.

programme.title: Insidious: The Red Door
programme.desc: The horror franchise's original cast returns for the final chapter. The Lamberts go deeper into 'The Further' than ever before to put their demons to rest, once and for all.

programme.title: Framed By My Sister
programme.desc: A twisted and suspenseful thriller about revenge between triplets. Twin sisters Reina and Alex are targeted by an angry long-lost triplet seeking to right old wrongs.

programme.title: Sinister Sorority
programme.desc: A suspenseful thriller. An ambitious college student is excited to have a new sorority sister until she uncovers her sister's dark past.

programme.title: War Dogs
programme.desc: Jonah Hill and Miles Teller are adventurous, reckless young men who turn the arms industry inside out in this riveting film based on a true story.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: Matthew McConaughey and Anne Hathaway take centre stage in this Christopher Nolan sci-fi about a group of astronauts who go on a mission to save humanity from a dying earth.

programme.title: Man Of Steel
programme.desc: From the visionary mind that brought you The Dark Knight. A young Superman discovers his true origins. Expect action-fuelled clashes between the caped hero and the forces of evil.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger takes on a softer role in this crime comedy. A cop has his hands full when he goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher.

programme.title: Hancock
programme.desc: Will Smith stars in this unique superhero film. A broken down hero, with a bad reputation, begins to change when a man he saves tries to help him turn his life around.

programme.title: xXx
programme.desc: Vin Diesel is the action man who knows no fear in this thrilling adventure. An extreme sports star is recruited by the government for a top secret mission.

programme.title: Vanquish
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman and Ruby Rose lead this slick action thriller. An ex-cop forces a former drug courier to take out a series of gangsters, or she will never see her child again.

programme.title: Last Man Down
programme.desc: A film with an old-school action feel. After civilization succumbs to a deadly pandemic and his wife is murdered, a special forces soldier flees to the wilderness.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: A gripping retelling of a classic tale. The king's musketeers join forces with an eager recruit to protect France from a deadly plot.

programme.title: Full View
programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in-depth.

programme.title: The Late Edition
programme.desc: A 360 view of all the stories that made headlines through packages, features, and interviews. This is also a platform for late-night breaking stories and or any developing news stories through the night.

programme.title: It's Topical
programme.desc: Viewers get to air their opinions on the big stories of the day or week. It's Topical gives you a sense of the nation's mood. Digital, pacy, interactive and engaging journalism brought to the TV screen.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Morning Live focuses on what South Africans are waking up to on the day. The show carries the Diary for the day, Market Sense, General News, Crime and Courts issues, Political issues, Sports News, Live weather and traffic reports.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: Agenda breaks down the stories of the day, as set in Morning Live, in more detail and giving stories more substance as the story develops. These stories take news agenda forward.

programme.title: On Point
programme.desc: On Point follows the development of the general news of the day in-depth where the show informs viewers on the further developments on the stories. This is a blended segment with 2 hours of general news and markets segment for an hour.

programme.desc: SA Today is issue-driven and covers regional topical issues in an interview format. Invited guests give more depth on big provincial and regional stories that can be an issue of national importance. It also includes general news.

programme.desc: 'S2/E44 - The Bully Pledge/Finding Mary Mcguffin'. When Baljeet saves Buford's life, Buford decides to stop bullying him, and Baljeet can't stand it.
